programme.desc: When a successful publicist finds himself an unemployed single father back living with his dad in the suburbs, he learns to acknowledge what truly makes him happy.

programme.title: Coma
programme.desc: The film follows the lives of four patients recovering from their coma, documenting the effects of their brain injuries and recovery journey.

programme.title: The Polar Express
programme.desc: A doubting boy finds out first-hand that Santa exists when he goes aboard a magical train headed for the North Pole.

programme.title: In the Gloaming

programme.title: How to Train your Dragon 2

programme.title: The Secret Life of Pets

programme.title: Death of A Unicorn
programme.desc: Father-Daughter duo Elliott and Ridley hit a unicorn with their car and bring it to the wilderness retreat of a mega-wealthy pharmaceutical CEO.

programme.title: Gladiator II

programme.title: Holiday Harmony
programme.desc: A talented underdog gets momentarily sidelined from chasing her musical dreams when her van breaks down in a small town just before Christmas.

programme.title: Austin Powers in Goldmember

programme.title: Four Christmases

programme.title: The Adventures of Tintin

programme.title: Holiday Harmony
programme.desc: A talented underdog gets momentarily sidelined from chasing her musical dreams when her van breaks down in a small town just before Christmas.

programme.title: Father of the Bride
programme.desc: An uptight father tries to come to grips with his daughter's upcoming wedding, framed through the prism of multiple relationships within a big, sprawling Cuban-American Latino clan.

programme.title: The King's Letters
programme.desc: King Sejong desires to create an original alphabet for his people. With the help of others, they struggle to create the Korean alphabet Hangul.

programme.title: Race to Freedom: Um Bok Dong
programme.desc: K-pop star Rain portrays Um Bok-dong, an unlikely hero in a government-organized bicycle race during the Japanese colonial era. Defeating Japanese rivals, his victories inspire locals and resistance fighters.

programme.title: Love 911
programme.desc: A doctor tries to woo a grieving, widowed firefighter in her attempt to get him to testify on her behalf in a medical malpractice case.

programme.title: Pretty Crazy
programme.desc: Gil-gu falls for his new neighbor, Sun-ji. She is sweet by day but appears uncanny at night. He later learns that there is a devil inside her and wants to unravel with her curse...

programme.title: Innocent Witness
programme.desc: A housekeeper is charged with murder. Her attorney is surprised to learn the only witness to the crime is a teenage girl with Asperger's. Will the girl be able to provide a valid statement?

programme.title: Punch-Drunk Love
programme.desc: Bok-seo gave up to be a soccer player after an injury. He meets Bok-hee and falls in love with her. Bok-hee feels unsure but she appreciates his sincerity, leading to something special...

programme.title: Sisters On the Road
programme.desc: After her mother's death, Myung-eun meets her sister Myung-ju. They do not share the same father and decided to travel together to find Myung-eun's father. A secret of her father reveals...

programme.title: Il Mare
programme.desc: A young woman from 1999 and a young man from 1997 begin a parallel-time love story separated by a span of two years when they start to receive each other's letters in the mailbox.

programme.title: Montage

programme.title: Usury Academy

programme.title: War of the Arrows
programme.desc: Set during the second Manchu invasion of Korea, Nam Yi, the best archer in Korea, goes up against the Qing Dynasty to rescue his younger sister Ja In - who was to be enslaved by the Manchurians.

programme.title: I (2021)
programme.desc: Ah-Young who grew up in an orphanage becomes the babysitter of Young-Chae, who is raising a 6-month-old child on her own. One day, her child has an accident and she places all the blame on Ah-Young...

programme.title: 4PM

programme.title: Dr. Cheon and the Lost Talisman

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: The kids manage to make it through the crazy storm and build gliders out of parts of the fallen spy plane to travel closer to Cleve’s base and save Nowhere and Gary. Cleve sees the kids on his satellite feeds and sends a bunch of drones to take them out. During the aerial battle, Cisco splits off and leads the drones away so that the rest of the crew can escape, causing him to be lost alone in the giant storm

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: The kids hatch a plan to take down Cleve and rescue Ms. Nowhere and Gary. Meanwhile, despite interference from Ziri, Cleve successfully begins to launch his satellites into space, which will allow him to use his weather machine to destroy Earth’s major cities and transform the Sahara into the only oasis. In order to stop the satellites, the team engages in an all-out battle against Cleve, Matsuo, and Rafaela. Just when it looks like our guys have the upperhand, Cleve shows them he has one last trick up his sleeve – a mech suit!

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Cleve has the team surrounded – is this the end? Suddenly, Cisco bursts in to save the day, along with all of the friends the team has made along the way in the Sahara. Working together, they manage to stop Cleve’s missiles and defeat Rafaela and Matsuo. But before they get a chance to celebrate, a giant fire tornado tears its way through the Sahara destroying everything in its path. Tony decides to make one last daring attempt in order to save the day.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Leroy must learn to let go when his caterpillar friend turns into a butterfly. / When Pixie loses her spark, Kelp and Juniper look for the plant they think will cure her. Meanwhile Pixie wonders whether she can be cured at all!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: With a little help from Gabby’s imagination, a sparkly toy banana turns into a magical Rainy Day Banana that helps Gabby and the Gabby Cats have fun on a rainy day! For our Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Cakey sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: The dollhouse is immersed in imaginative Wild West play with Sheriff Gabby, Sheriff Pandy, and CatRat the Bandit. Sheriff Gabby and Sheriff Pandy must safely deliver gold to the bank, but it gets confiscated by Bandit CatRat! They go on an adventure to get the gold back and restore order in the dollhouse.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Ranger Hoof invites Marty on a Junior Ranger night trot in Central Park, Marty is determined to prove he's got what it takes to do the job- but when Alex tags along for the ride, Marty learns that "what it takes" is a whole lot of teamwork.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: During the Lunar New Year festival, Alex is bummed to learn that there's no Year of the Lion. Determined to be somebody important, he sets out to become the star of the festival by taking on the role of the Dragon- but he eventually learns that every role has importance, and realizes the costume that fits him best is his own fur.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When Donna is dog sitting but unable to sleep due to barking, TZG secretly stops a skunk from sneaking into her yard at night and riling the pooch. / When an inexperienced Rona takes over as chairman of the Founder’s Day Celebration, TZG secretly helps ensure the traditional festivities run smoothly.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When fun-loving, water-dwelling tadpole LALA shows up in Gloria’s tank, the two become underwater besties! But when Molly wants Gloria to spend “Palentine’s Day” with her, Gloria can’t admit she’s already made plans to spend it with her “land” friends and runs herself ragged running back and forth between Molly and the gang. Gloria’s attempts to make everyone happy backfire, leading her to learn that she can have different groups of friends, and it’s okay to play with them one at a time, or all together!

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: Gloria wants spring to come! She’s SICK of winter and is counting down the days until the Central Park pond melts so she can retrieve a toy she lost in the water before it froze! So when Goldie the Groundhog predicts more winter, Gloria sets out to make spring come, by any means necessary! When she fails at controlling the weather, Gloria learns that when something doesn’t go your way, embrace Plan B!

And somehow, Po finds himself in a chess tournament against the Queen of England!

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: There is more epic action and intrigue as Po and the Dragon Knights continue their quest to destroy the Tianshang weapons, but find themselves in treacherous waters when they are captured by pirates, one of which is out for revenge against Mr. Ping! The adventures lead them to London, where they are wanted by the Knights. Old enemies resurface and Blade will have to face one of her most challenging opponents—her mom. And somehow, Po finds himself in a chess tournament against the Queen of England!

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: The kids manage to make it through the crazy storm and build gliders out of parts of the fallen spy plane to travel closer to Cleve’s base and save Nowhere and Gary. Cleve sees the kids on his satellite feeds and sends a bunch of drones to take them out. During the aerial battle, Cisco splits off and leads the drones away so that the rest of the crew can escape, causing him to be lost alone in the giant storm

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: The kids hatch a plan to take down Cleve and rescue Ms. Nowhere and Gary. Meanwhile, despite interference from Ziri, Cleve successfully begins to launch his satellites into space, which will allow him to use his weather machine to destroy Earth’s major cities and transform the Sahara into the only oasis. In order to stop the satellites, the team engages in an all-out battle against Cleve, Matsuo, and Rafaela. Just when it looks like our guys have the upperhand, Cleve shows them he has one last trick up his sleeve – a mech suit!

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Cleve has the team surrounded – is this the end? Suddenly, Cisco bursts in to save the day, along with all of the friends the team has made along the way in the Sahara. Working together, they manage to stop Cleve’s missiles and defeat Rafaela and Matsuo. But before they get a chance to celebrate, a giant fire tornado tears its way through the Sahara destroying everything in its path. Tony decides to make one last daring attempt in order to save the day.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: The only way that Jim can remove Stricklers ring is if he stops time but he uses the time stopping artefact too soon..

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When unexpected guests arrive bringing AAARRRGGHHs past and illness to light Jim finds himself competing in a terrifying game of Pyrobligst.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Jim and Strickler team up to bring down Angor Rot Meanwhile the Gnome returns with important information regarding Baby Enrique.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When General Morando and Colonel Kubritz attack the Mothership, Team Tarron must fight to protect the King and Queen’s Cores and their lives… with shocking, fatal results.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Aja and Krel travel into their parents’ memories in pursuit of Morando – and the truth about Gaylen’s Core. But when the King and Queen’s lives are jeopardized, a trusted ally makes a sacrifice that will change the team forever.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: With their parents nearly regenerated and Morando in pursuit of Gaylen’s Core, Aja, Krel, and Vex unite with Toby and Arrgh on a quest into the depths of Trollmarket to unearth the relic before it ends up in the wrong hands.

programme.title: Voltron: Legendary Defender
programme.desc: A paladinis trapped in a distant Galra outpost

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: When Grug and Ugga leave the kids alone on date night, Eep throws the first-ever house party that rages out of control and almost destroys the cave.

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: When Eep has the first-ever sleepover, scary noises and shadows send the girls screaming out of the cave; Thunk saves the day when Bear Owls invade.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Riding Academy
programme.desc: Lucky doesn't want her friends to miss their favorite Miradero traditions while they're away at school. So why not celebrate them all in one day?

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Riding Academy
programme.desc: On their first day at Palomino Bluffs, the girls are determined to make a good impression. Cue the beachfront race — and a daring rescue!

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: Ty and the crew must protect the Flatirons from Pounder, a predatory Poundersaurolophus who marks his territory by hammering everything in sight

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Ring My Bell When Casper encourages Quasi to go on strike from his thankless job as chore boy, Alder and Dash make Casper take his place. First Mate Casper When Cappy needs a first mate, Casper's the only one who's up to the challenge.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Power Outage – Part 1: A Powerful Foe When Scare School falls victim to the Baccora, Kibosh encourages the students to work together, setting booby-traps and building defences. Power Outage – Part 2: Razznik's Revenge Creature by creature, the evil entity, Baccora, robs Scare School of its powers and locks them into a magical cleptor.

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: When Ping Pong says she is too busy to join a story reading day Raggety magically brings the books to life and they fly to Ping Pong's Pagoda, where they start to tell her their stories.

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: Rupert, Ping Pong, Bill, Edward and Raggety find some magical, musical stepping stones deep in the woods and unwittingly unleash a naughty young genie bent on making mischief.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: When one of Rikki’s plants won't sing, Pixie and Juniper both tell their varying recollections of why the plant is suddenly silent. / Kelp, Scallop, and Cruz have always thought that starfish did nothing but laze about; but as they go about their day, the starfish goes through his own routine, completely unbeknownst to everyone else.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Leroy must learn to let go when his caterpillar friend turns into a butterfly. / When Pixie loses her spark, Kelp and Juniper look for the plant they think will cure her. Meanwhile Pixie wonders whether she can be cured at all!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: With a little help from Gabby’s imagination, a sparkly toy banana turns into a magical Rainy Day Banana that helps Gabby and the Gabby Cats have fun on a rainy day! They have silly banana snacks with Cakey, make crafts to tell a story with Baby Box, and have an a-meow-zing banana dance party with DJ Catnip. For our Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Cakey sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: The dollhouse is immersed in imaginative Wild West play with Sheriff Gabby, Sheriff Pandy, and CatRat the Bandit. Sheriff Gabby and Sheriff Pandy must safely deliver gold to the bank, but it gets confiscated by Bandit CatRat! They go on an adventure to get the gold back and restore order in the dollhouse.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Ranger Hoof invites Marty on a Junior Ranger night trot in Central Park, Marty is determined to prove he's got what it takes to do the job- but when Alex tags along for the ride, Marty learns that "what it takes" is a whole lot of teamwork.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: During the Lunar New Year festival, Alex is bummed to learn that there's no Year of the Lion. Determined to be somebody important, he sets out to become the star of the festival by taking on the role of the Dragon- but he eventually learns that every role has importance, and realizes the costume that fits him best is his own fur.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: When one of Rikki’s plants won't sing, Pixie and Juniper both tell their varying recollections of why the plant is suddenly silent. / Kelp, Scallop, and Cruz have always thought that starfish did nothing but laze about; but as they go about their day, the starfish goes through his own routine, completely unbeknownst to everyone else.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Leroy must learn to let go when his caterpillar friend turns into a butterfly. / When Pixie loses her spark, Kelp and Juniper look for the plant they think will cure her. Meanwhile Pixie wonders whether she can be cured at all!

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When Rodney draws and writes his own comic book, TZG secretly helps him transport it to the comic book store where creator Ken KaBlam is on the hunt for new talent. / When Ken KaBlam gets homesick for his own hometown of Crostonburg, TZG secretly recreates the things me misses in Harmony Harbor.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When Donna is dog sitting but unable to sleep due to barking, TZG secretly stops a skunk from sneaking into her yard at night and riling the pooch. / When an inexperienced Rona takes over as chairman of the Founder’s Day Celebration, TZG secretly helps ensure the traditional festivities run smoothly.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When fun-loving, water-dwelling tadpole LALA shows up in Gloria’s tank, the two become underwater besties! But when Molly wants Gloria to spend “Palentine’s Day” with her, Gloria can’t admit she’s already made plans to spend it with her “land” friends and runs herself ragged running back and forth between Molly and the gang. Gloria’s attempts to make everyone happy backfire, leading her to learn that she can have different groups of friends, and it’s okay to play with them one at a time, or all together!

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: Gloria wants spring to come! She’s SICK of winter and is counting down the days until the Central Park pond melts so she can retrieve a toy she lost in the water before it froze! So when Goldie the Groundhog predicts more winter, Gloria sets out to make spring come, by any means necessary! When she fails at controlling the weather, Gloria learns that when something doesn’t go your way, embrace Plan B!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby, Pandy, and Carlita prepare for the annual Meow-Mazing Games, they encounter stiff competition from the Doodads and must work together to bring home the coveted dollhouse trophy.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It’s Pandy’s birthday!! The dollhouse is throwing a surprise party for him! Gabby goes room to room preparing all his favorite things for the party, but when the big moment comes, Pandy drops his cake! Gabby consoles him and tells him it’s even better – now, they have smash cake! They all hold up a piece and pose for a picture.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: The Rescue Riders get stuck in a cave with their rival, Magnus, during a race to find a new source of an important mineral.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: Frustrated that she's not fitting in with the team, Aggro goes off on her own with Elbone on a mission to save a dragon egg trapped in ice.

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody and Sherman Show
programme.desc: When Sherman hasn't slept in days because of a recurring nightmare, he causes mayhem on the set and Peabody must help Sherman confront his fears

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody and Sherman Show
programme.desc: When Orchoptitron breaks up with his love - the toaster oven - Peabody and Sherman take it upon themselves to cheer him up by playing The Data Game

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms S2
programme.desc: Tom and the riders must work together to rescue Eugene from a dragon’s nest.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms S2
programme.desc: Tom must rescue Olivia from the Hidden World when she winds up getting herself frozen by a pack of hungry Speed Stingers.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: Julien, Clover, Mort and Maurice become music sensations overnight, but the band breaks up over Julien and Clover's non-stop fighting

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: After Uncle King Julien turned Pancho into a deadly killer so he could take back his throne, King Julien must save the kingdom before it's too late

programme.title: The Adventures of Puss in Boots
programme.desc: As he tries to restore the magic spell that will protect San Lorenzo, Puss accidentally brings Artephius's macramé owl shop to life.

programme.title: The Adventures of Puss in Boots
programme.desc: While searching for items missing from the treasure house, Puss enlists the help of the Scimitar, an evil sword that turns its wielder wicked.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: Astrid comes down with the Odin's Revenge flu and the Riders must search for the cure by finding a nearly extinct Buffalord dragon before Viggo does.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: The Riders head to a tropical island for fun in the sun, not realizing it's infested with Grimora Leeches which drives their dragons to turn on them.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: When Heather and Windshear land on Dragon's Edge to join the Dragon Rider crew, they quickly discover that Windshear doesn't play well with others.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: When Hope oversteps by trying to teach Sandy manners, Ugga gets her revenge by challenging Hope to do the impossible: civilize Thunk.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: Ugga has a secret - she's taking Eep to "flop with the bulrusses" - a fun and dangerous pastime Ugga enjoyed as a teen. Ugga's excitement fades when Hope invites herself and Dawn along.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: Bored of the viewing options on window, Thunk realizes what he’s been missing – real life drama! But when Thunk starts creating drama around the farm, the others set out to teach him a lesson.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Boss thought that breaking his arm was painful;but the true pain starts at pediatrician Dr. Kevin’s “jokes.” Boss enlists the playgroup babies to defang the doctor of his “comedian’s disease.” Tim obsesses about keeping his little brother safe.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Boss has an opportunity to get his old job back at Baby Corp;but to get the interview;he’ll need the playgroup babies to help him escape Marsha Krinkle’s super-safe Bubbeezee playroom. Tim nearly misses Kabob Day at school.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Boss comes face to face with his old nemesis;Bug The Pug;after the playgroup parents decide to throw a Puppy Party. Staci creates a “No-Paperworkist” movement to avoid Buddy From HR’s constant paperwork.

Having been stopped at several military checkpoints along the way, but is surprised when he receives a warm welcome from the local commander and coins it 'Checkpoint Cheerful'.

programme.title: Nostalgia
programme.desc: Nostalgia aims to represent Chinese traditional culture by revealing life in villages in the way of story-telling. In this show, the audience can enjoy the natural and cultural backgrounds of Chinese traditional villages, and will find their knowledge of this oriental country expand through the interviews of Chinese people overseas whose memory and nostalgia can also reveal the very core value of the Chinese traditional culture.

programme.title: Across the Strait
programme.desc: The Across the Strait traces the much-discussed issues across the Strait, reflects the will of the citizens on two sides of the Strait and details the Chinese Government’s policy of “one country, two systems” in a bid to enhance the Taiwan fellowmen’s understanding of the Mainland China.

programme.title: The Return of Superman
programme.desc: Parenting challenges of "Superman" , the first hero that children encounter when they are born.

programme.title: Our Happy Days
programme.desc: A chaotic, high-stakes family saga where a seemingly perfect man and an endearingly flawed woman collide while every generation fights to become the main character of their own life.

programme.title: Pearl in Red
programme.desc: A meticulous and intense revenge chronicle in which two women return under false identities to uncover the truths and sins hidden within the Adel family.

programme.title: Noona, You Are A Woman To Me
programme.desc: Age is just a number—attraction is pure instinct. Charismatic “Noonas” (older women) who have long put love on hold to pursue their careers meet younger men who fearlessly follow their hearts, sparking emotionally driven romances. Breaking through the real-world barriers of age differences, this bold and candid reality series follows older-woman–younger-man couples as they explore love with honesty and courage. As their relationships unfold, long-dormant romantic instincts are awakened in this refreshingly daring dating reality show.

programme.title: Problem Child in House
programme.desc: A collection of outrageous problems that you have never heard of! A great 'knowledge talk show' where problematic children who are struggling and fighting in the emotional rooftop room gain true wisdom about life and the world.

programme.title: Recipe for Love
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: The Best of Immortal Songs
programme.desc: The true classic of the century is born again! The legendary classic is reinterpreted by the best vocalists in Korea. Don't miss out on the heart-moving moments that transcend generations.

programme.title: KBS World News Today
programme.desc: KBS World Daily English News Anchor : Choi Kyu-yeon

programme.title: Jang Youngsil: The Greatest Scientist of Joseon
programme.desc: The drama is the first 'historic science' drama that has been produced in Korea. This drama depicts the successful life story of the scientist Jang Youngsil that contributed to the development and accomplishment of Joseon's science during the 15th century. In particular, the drama emphasizes his accomplishment through showing the restrictions and difficulties he experienced due to his social class as a slave. Moreover, the drama aims to depict Jang Youngsil as the role model of 'Korea's youth of the 21st century' through displaying his scientific accomplishments. The drama also expects to stimulate scientific curiosity amongst audiences and help them easily understand the fundamental principles of science by utilizing various data and scientific videos.

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: Kowloon Walled City
programme.desc: Neng was a street fighter in Northeast China but decides to start a new life in Hong Kong’s Kowloon Walled City. Unfortunately, he is implicated in the fights and conspiracies among the triad forces. When his good friend is hunted down by the triad, Neng must team up with the residents of Kowloon Walled City to fight back and save his friend.

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: Young Ip Man: Crisis Time
programme.desc: Set in 1917, young Ip Man pursues his studies in Hong Kong. The school is held hostage on the day of an English speech competition, and as Ip Man decides to step up and fight the crisis, it is revealed that his master and his childhood friend are behind all this. Can he take them down and uphold justice?

programme.title: A Good Deal
programme.desc: Kidnapped by a desperate couple, businessman Burks Hill is forced on a frantic journey to Los Angeles. As danger mounts, the three travellers discover that they each harbour deadly secrets. What began as a simple kidnapping spirals into a lethal game where no one's plan will survive.

programme.title: The Ultimate BROcation
programme.desc: A hilarious reality show about four famous male celebrities from different countries on an all-expenses-paid fantasy vacation in Hong Kong, tailor-made for the “bros”!

programme.title: Wusong vs Ximenqing
programme.desc: Wu Song finds out about his sister-in-law’s affair with a rich man, Ximen Qing. Qing sets Song up and have him exiled for a year, during which his hapless brother is murdered and cremated. When Song finally returns home, he takes the case to court but the judge brushes it aside and closes it abruptly. Can Song finally avenge his brother’s death?

programme.title: Blood Hunters: Rise of the Hybri
programme.desc: Gabriella is driven by vengeance after a hybrid monster slaughters her family. On her quest, she joins a squad of Blood Hunters and together they wage war against ruthless underworld warlords, igniting a brutal showdown.

programme.title: Rachael Ray in Tuscany
programme.desc: Actor and family friend Jeremy Sisto joins Rachael in her Tuscan kitchen to learn how to make hunter's chicken, known in Italy as cacciatore, served with generous helpings of bruschetta.

programme.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes
programme.desc: Pantoh is a Taiwanese dining experience where guests enjoy exquisite dishes in open-air venues. Chef Ah-yong showcases an emblematic dish of pantoh cuisine: calamari, sea snail, and leek soup.

programme.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes
programme.desc: Taiwanese cuisine boasts wide variations of chicken soup, and Chef A-lin has a special recipe. Learn more about how Chef A-lin creates the most complex flavor with the most elegant approach.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S1)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece brings a Southern twist to a traditional recipe by adding bacon, lettuce, and tomato to the Dutch Baby "pancake", and serves it alongside a colourful asparagus and radish salad.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1)
programme.desc: With the power of spirit behind Theresa, her journey giving the ultimate gift of peace continues. A touching follow-up message from a podcast reading confirms Theresa's lasting impact on those in need.

programme.title: Our Dead Husband
programme.desc: When Kris discovers her husband Ritchie shot dead in their home, she assumes it has to do with his work in high-level intelligence. But she then learns that his missions were a cover for a secret family.

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips
programme.desc: James takes on a dying home in need of a major facelift: a 104-year-old house brought to him by a rookie flipper. With the property in dire condition, James and his team must rethink the layout.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out (S1)
programme.desc: Dr. Lee asks Dr. Zoe to help double-team needle-shy Mary Ann's crusty skin. Isaiah's mom is concerned that he is ignoring the large, growing lump over his lower spine.

programme.title: MasterChef USA (S13)
programme.desc: The top 17 chefs return for the second Mystery Box Challenge - with a twist: one region will begin the challenge 10 minutes behind the rest. With one box per region, chefs must race against time.

programme.title: Hoax: The Kidnapping of Sherri Papini
programme.desc: In 2016, Sherri Papini's disappearance captivated the nation, but her abduction story unraveled when it was revealed she was not a kidnap victim as she initially claimed.

programme.title: Our Dead Husband
programme.desc: When Kris discovers her husband Ritchie shot dead in their home, she assumes it has to do with his work in high-level intelligence. But she then learns that his missions were a cover for a secret family.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes (S1)
programme.desc: Rachael cooks up pork loin chops with sweet onions and apples, serving it with twice-baked potatoes topped with sour cream and chives - all in minutes!

programme.title: Rachael Ray in Tuscany
programme.desc: Actor and family friend Jeremy Sisto joins Rachael in her Tuscan kitchen to learn how to make hunter's chicken, known in Italy as cacciatore, served with generous helpings of bruschetta.

programme.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes
programme.desc: Be it savoury or sweet, Taro is one of the key ingredients that characterises Taiwanese cuisine. Learn more about how this classic Taiwanese dish honours the tradition and terroir.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S16)
programme.desc: The judges’ give the top three a break in round one by facing off in a mystery box cook, before going head-to-head with the Semi-Finalists in a relay.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: Dining out takes flight into the world of fantasy when host Michael Yo shows us that make-believe experiences can be really tasty. First stop is a restaurant in New York City's Financial District.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out (S1)
programme.desc: Jimmy is a firefighter whose many torso bumps make it painful to play with his young son. Tashika needs a kidney transplant, but her doctors will not do it until she gets her HS under control.

programme.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes
programme.desc: Taiwanese cuisine boasts wide variations of chicken soup, and Chef A-lin has a special recipe. Learn more about how Chef A-lin creates the most complex flavor with the most elegant approach.

programme.title: Our Dead Husband
programme.desc: When Kris discovers her husband Ritchie shot dead in their home, she assumes it has to do with his work in high-level intelligence. But she then learns that his missions were a cover for a secret family.

programme.title: How She Caught a Killer
programme.desc: The Route 40 Killer targets sex workers with an unknown motive. Detective Linda Murphy goes undercover and gets entangled in a chilling cat-and-mouse game, reminiscent of The Silence of the Lambs.

programme.title: Enlighten Your Life (S3)
programme.desc: As people spend more time at home due to the pandemic, interest in home decor has surged. We'll be showcasing two distinct styles: a Hanok that embodies Eastern beauty, and a Western-style house.

programme.title: Airline Wars
programme.desc: Airline drama is at an all-time high and we've got the viral videos to prove it. See what happens when people are caught on camera acting up and acting out. We're headed for the not-so-friendly skies.

programme.title: Airline Wars
programme.desc: Utter chaos erupts when a man goes on the attack while waiting in the security line. A pilot is arrested for attempting to operate an aircraft while under the influence.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Holidays
programme.desc: What is red, white and green all over? It's Rachael Ray's lasagne! Rachael shows how to make delicious lasagne by layering sheets of pasta with cime di rapa, ricotta and a ragu sauce.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Holidays
programme.desc: Impress your holiday guests with a classic cheesy fondue party! Rachael shows how to make her version of an easy and decadent "Fundue" that is sure to bring everyone around to celebrate the holidays.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S16)
programme.desc: With Curtis Stone’s help, our three Semi-Finalists serve a three-course menu for 20 diners and judges, competing for a place in the Grand Finale.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes (S1)
programme.desc: In honour of Rachael's rock-star friends, she's making hella mexa suiza burgers, or hamburgers and fries cooked with Mexican spices and topped with Swiss and Mexican soft cheese.

programme.title: Rachael Ray in Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael shows how to make bacalao con pomodoro, a dish inspired by an amazing meal she shared with husband John during a special trip to Elba, a Mediterranean island in Tuscany.

programme.title: The Context USA
programme.desc: Special coverage from Washington DC and London, focusing on President Trump's second term.

programme.title: I Dream of Jeannie S5 E05 - Jeannie's Beauty Cream

programme.title: T. J. Hooker S3 E18 - Death on the Line

programme.title: Giant
programme.desc: Wealthy rancher Bick Benedict (Hudson) and dirt-poor cowboy Jett Rink (Dean) both woo Leslie Lynnton (Taylor) a beautiful young woman from Maryland who is new to Texas. She marries Benedict, but she is shocked by the racial bigotry of the White Texans against the local people of Mexican descent. Rink discovers oil on a small plot of land, and while he uses his vast, new wealth to buy all the land surrounding the Benedict ranch, the Benedict's disagreement over prejudice fuels conflict the runs across generations.

Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: Arts24
programme.desc: Culture news from the world's art, food, and fashion capital, Paris, bringing you the latest trends, exhibitions, culinary innovations, and style movements that continue to shape global taste and creativity.

programme.title: News
programme.desc: Watch the latest international top stories, The News every 30 minutes with the emphasis on debate, dialogue, role of cultural differences, analytics of key events all over the world, comments, hot topics of the day, reports.

programme.title: A Propos
programme.desc: A comprehensive and in-depth look at a single story making headlines around the world, exploring its context, key developments, and the wider impact it is having across different countries and communities.

programme.title: Walking Tall (2004)
programme.desc: Chris Vaughn, a former soldier of the US Special Forces, returns to his hometown, where he discovers that it has been overrun by a shady casino owner and corrupt police officers.

programme.title: E.T.,The Extra-Terrestrial
programme.desc: Captivating audiences of all ages, this timeless story follows the unforgettable journey of a lost alien and the 10-year-old boy he befriends.

programme.title: Casablanca
programme.desc: Rick Blaine owns a nightclub in Vichy controlled Casablanca, frequented by refugees desperate to escape German domination. Despite the ever-present human misery, Rick manages to remain uninvolved in World War II now raging across Europe and Northern Africa. But all that changes when Ilsa Lund walks through the front door of Rick's club. Rick must now choose between a life with the woman he loves and becoming the hero that both she and the world need.

programme.title: Tremors
programme.desc: Kevin Bacon and Fred Ward are in a fight for their lives when they discover that their desolate town has been infested with gigantic man-eating creatures that live below the ground!

programme.title: Along Came Polly
programme.desc: When risk-averse Reuben Feffer's bride dumps him on their honeymoon, his life is thrown completely off track, until, a chance encounter with Polly, an adventure craving, childhood friend.

programme.title: East Asia Tonight
programme.desc: (Live) Spotlight on East Asia, a region steeped in history and now helping to write the future of our world. We'll break down the key stories and explain why they matter.

programme.title: Lasak
programme.desc: At 18, Sakura is amongst the Japanese top female Sumo practitioners. As she angles for global domination, she wonders if it's time to shed the patriarchal norms that limit female participation.

programme.title: Model Family
programme.desc: A single-parent family (Yu Xiang and Tong Tong) moves into a new neighbourhood where everyone’s life seems perfect. However, while things may look rosy on the outside, dark secrets and horror raid each family from the inside, and nothing really are as they seem.

programme.title: A Woman Scorned
programme.desc: Jas's peaceful countryside getaway with her sister Laura is shattered when a group of drifters attacks them. After Laura is brutally killed, Jas discovers her lifeless body at their rented cabin. Consumed by grief and fury, she vows to hunt down the gang and take vengeance on her sister's murderer.

programme.title: Get in the Dark
programme.desc: A reporter hears three horror stories when investigating a case of the paper doll spirit 20 years ago. Miss Qiao had died in vain then, and her butler paid a paper craftsman to make a paper doll to be buried with her. Miss Qiao’s spirit is revived to take revenge when the doll’s eyes are drawn, and a series of horrible events begins to happen...

programme.title: Guns of Eden
programme.desc: During a camping trip deep in the mountains, former Buffalo cop Megan and her friends stumble upon the local sheriff unlawfully executing a drug trafficker. Spotted and marked for death, they find every escape route sealed. To cover up his crime, the sheriff summons an armed militia to hunt them down—triggering a deadly chase with no way out.

programme.title: Zhong Kui Exorcism
programme.desc: After hunting fox demons, Zhong Kui returns to Heyang Village only to discover that his lover and neighbours have been slaughtered. Following the trail to Lingdu City, he encounters Princess Liu Li, who has been cursed into a half-human, half-monster form. Armed with his demon-slaying sword, he battles the demons to save Liu Li and protect the city.

programme.title: Mama Ghost
programme.desc: In a coastal town, a forbidden romance sparks between Rico and Sisca, and their love unleashes a malevolent spirit. As chilling deaths plague the town, past secrets are being unraveled and the town is possessed by evil and fear. Rico must defy destiny and fight against the evil spirit to save his loved one.

programme.title: The Ice Cream Truck
programme.desc: Mary moves back to her suburban hometown as her husband is relocated there for work. While waiting for her husband in their new house, Mary becomes the target of an evil slasher that stalks the suburbs in an ice-cream truck. She soon learns that the suburbs are not what they seem...

programme.title: Court Cam (S6)
programme.desc: A look at some of the wildest courtroom moments. A defendant wants a hip-hop superstar to be his lawyer; a man is convicted in a murder-for-hire plot; a woman attacks her attorney in court; and more.

programme.title: Court Cam (S6)
programme.desc: A look at some of the wildest courtroom moments. A man in custody attempts a daring escape from court; a sovereign citizen argues with a judge about laws; and more.

programme.title: First Blood (S1)
programme.desc: Aileen Wuornos is a woman fleeing a troubled past and yearning for a connection. Instead of finding love, she develops a simmering rage in her heart that finally explodes.

programme.title: Ozark Law (S1)
programme.desc: Detective Sergeant Mark Kordula and Chief Boren face the wave of underage drinkers pouring into the bars with fake IDs at night. Officer Phylicia Carson pulls over a suspected drunk driver.

programme.title: After the First 48 (S16)
programme.desc: A beloved mother is found stabbed to death in a vacant lot, and when New Orleans detectives investigate the case, their only suspect seems an unlikely killer.

programme.title: After the First 48 (S15)
programme.desc: Tulsa homicide delves into a dark world of drugs and prostitution to solve the murder of a man executed in his car in a motel parking lot.

programme.title: The First 48 (S26)
programme.desc: When a man is found inside of a truck, stabbed 45 times, a bilingual Tulsa community comes together to help Detective Mark Kennedy identify the victim and track down his killer.

programme.desc: Suriin ang iba't ibang maikling kuwento, nobela, tula, sanaysay, at dula.

programme.desc: Learn about circulatory and respiratory system, genetic information, the patterns of inheritance, and species of extinction. Discover the parts of plants involved in photosynthesis and respiration.
